ABYDOS HIGH SCHOOL

Used to be a thriving school.

Due to desertification and a massive sandstorm, most of the cities' buildings have been covered in sand and ruined. Abydos is in 962,350,000-yen debt. Mercenaries kept on attacking the school to claim it.
